title: Contact Us | National Institutes of Health (NIH)
content: Mission and Goals Organization The NIH Director The NIH Almanac NIH...Turning Discovery Into Health® Impact of NIH Research Science, Health, and Public Trust Visitor Information Get Involved at NIH Jobs at NIH Contact Us Contact Us Contact Us The information and email services on this website cannot provide personalized medical advice about conditions or treatments. The resources on this site should not be used as a substitute for professional medical care. Contact your medical care providers for answers to personal health questions. We also do not rate or provide referrals to physicians or health care facilities. Such activities are usually handled by state or local governments. General questions Image Please note that we cannot provide personalized medical advice about conditions or treatments. Grants and funding questions Image Our Grants Information staff can help point you in the right direction.
